evals.prompt: My Object UI dashboard looks broken on mobile phones — cards stack but the sidebar takes up the whole screen. How do I make it responsive?
evals.expected_output: Provides responsive grid schema with Tailwind mobile-first classes, useBreakpoint hook usage, and sidebar responsive pattern.

evals.prompt: I need my Object UI app to work offline — users should be able to view cached data and queue form submissions when there's no network.
evals.expected_output: Provides useOffline hook usage with queue management, sync state UI indicators, and offline-first data flow pattern.

evals.prompt: How do I add swipe-to-delete and long-press context menus to my Object UI list items on mobile?
evals.expected_output: Provides useSwipe and useLongPress hook usage from @object-ui/mobile with threshold and delay configuration.
